mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in greater than 55 percent of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 7.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals impending corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 7.0 percent over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with stable consumer prices indicate robust consumer demand without inflationary pressure, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative rank IC or positive returns occur in less than 45 percent of triggered cases over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-recession recovery phase signals immediate capacity utilization gains, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during recovery phases, producing negative 5-day returns in greater than 65 percent of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect strengthening economic activity and wage growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window or positive returns occur in less than 50 percent of months with payroll gains.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid acceleration in consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 60 percent of months where CPIAUCSL MoM change exceeds 0.4 percent over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in housing starts and real GDP growth confirms broad-based economic strength, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict positive returns in greater than 55 percent of quarters or produces a negative out-of-sample rank IC.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a late-cycle peak signals manufacturing contraction and inventory drawdowns, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal yields positive 5-day returns in greater than 60 percent of late-cycle contraction months over a 4-year rolling window.
